Container.Name: printspy
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: printspy 3d printer monitor octoprint dashboard print farm
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted dashboard for monitoring multiple 3D printers from a single web interface. Connects to OctoPrint and PrusaLink printers, displaying real-time status, webcam feeds, temperatures, print progress, and more via Server-Sent Events.
Features include a full File Manager with thumbnails and one-click reprint, print history with per-print material/filament stats, Pushover notifications, smart plug power control (Tasmota via direct HTTP or MQTT, or PSU Control), print control (pause/resume/cancel), and PrusaSlicer/OrcaSlicer print-host integration.
Open the web UI, add your printers, and you're set. No config files needed.
Web interface: http://UNRAID_IP:8080
Container.Changes:
###2026-07-15d - Fix: an MQTT smart plug never showed up on its printer's card if the device only publishes state on its own schedule (Tasmota's TelePeriod, factory default 300s) instead of a short custom interval - now actively queried for its current state right after subscribing, instead of waiting on the device to announce it
###2026-07-15c - MQTT support for directly-configured smart plugs — opt-in per-plug alternative to HTTP-direct Tasmota polling, push-based via a broker instead of a fresh HTTP round-trip every poll tick - New MQTT Broker settings section (host:port + TLS checkbox, Save/Test/Save-and-test) and a Direct HTTP / MQTT toggle in the Smart Plug modal - Both connection modes can be mixed freely across plugs
###2026-07-15b - Fix: a "no thumbnail yet" response was browser-cacheable, hiding a real thumbnail once it landed until a manual cache clear
###2026-07-15a - Real thumbnails in print History, backfilled for old rows too - Bumped File Manager metadata-backfill timeout (15s to 90s) — production files were timing out over real network conditions
###2026-07-15 - File-metadata and thumbnail caching for File Manager (PrusaLink) — parsed once at upload/completion/backfill instead of live on every view - Fixes .gcode thumbnails never showing and notification images vanishing after a job cleared - Every file now shows its material/tool, not just multi-tool prints - Fixed PrusaLink 8.3 short-filename and "%"-in-filename bugs affecting downloads/deletes/uploads
###2026-07-14a - Fix: camera/webcam boxes could briefly reappear on page load for printers configured to hide them while unreachable
###2026-07-14 - SNAP/LIVE/PLATE mode buttons per printer's camera/thumbnail image - Download button in File Manager - Global setting to hide camera/thumbnail section for an unreachable printer - Fixed dispatch hanging on an unresponsive smart plug when the printer itself was already reachable - Fixed print-complete/failed notifications sending no image - Fixed camera reassignment silently leaving two printers pointed at one camera
###2026-07-12 - Fixed: dispatched print jobs could hang if a printer's smart plug was unresponsive, even when the printer itself was already on and reachable
###2026-07-10d - Fixed spurious "Print Started" notifications (and re-fired checkpoints) when printspy restarted mid-print
###2026-07-10c - Configurable print history retention (Settings > General, 0 = keep forever) - File Manager thumbnails now lazy-load on scroll instead of all firing at once
###2026-07-10a - Fixed oversized Cancel button icon on iOS Safari/Firefox (CSS-drawn icons replace emoji-routed glyphs) - History modal reworked into a mobile-friendly card list
###2026-07-10 - Pushover notifications: print started, two configurable checkpoints, complete, failed, and printer error — each with its own priority, sound, image source, and custom templates - Settings gained a Send Test Notification button
###2026-07-08k - File Manager modal widened, filenames wrap instead of truncating
###2026-07-08j - Recent Files dropdown replaced with a full File Manager — one button per card lists every file on that printer's storage
###2026-07-08i - Slicer ingest targets now pin to one specific printer and relay automatically — Upload relays once online, Upload and Print powers on/waits/prints fully automatically - Fixed a settings crash when a slicer target had no label - Fixed concurrent uploads to the same offline printer racing on reconnect
###2026-07-08g - Runtime image now bundles the sqlite3 CLI for ad-hoc DB inspection - Fixed stale numeric-ID Host URL shown in the slicer target modal
###2026-07-08f - Slicer target save failures now show the real error instead of failing silently - Label input auto-slugifies
###2026-07-08e - Ingest job staging broadcasts a live dashboard refresh - Release builds dropped arm64/QEMU (Unraid is x86_64 only) - Ingest targets can use a label slug (/ingest/{label}) alongside numeric ID
###2026-07-08d - Dispatch always issues the print command on relay — plain slicer "Upload" now stages for a human print decision instead of silently uploading inert
###2026-07-08c - Fixed real file uploads timing out over wifi (dedicated 5-minute upload timeout) - Print control buttons (Pause/Resume/Cancel) now confirm, show progress, and update from the same response — no more racing a separate broadcast - Fixed webcam feed unnecessarily rebuilding on printer state changes
###2026-07-08b - Fixed changing the auto-off idle timeout could immediately cut power to printers already past the new threshold - Fixed snapshot/thumbnail proxies silently swallowing upstream errors
###2026-07-08a - Slicer print-host target: point PrusaSlicer/OrcaSlicer's "Send to printer" at PrintSpy, with optional auto-dispatch - Config export/import now covers smart plugs and cameras
###2026-07-08 - File upload from the dashboard for PrusaLink printers, with optional "print immediately" - printspy-cam integration — gives PrusaLink printers a working webcam feed - Auto-off after idle timeout + thermal runaway protection - Printer maintenance mode - PrusaLink keepalive ping, optional "model" field - New "attention" printer state, split from hard errors - Fixed PrusaLink digest auth breaking on filenames with spaces
###2026-07-03 - SSE heartbeat every 15s to prevent proxies from reaping idle dashboard connections
###2026-07-02b - Direct Tasmota smart plug support — talk to devices directly over HTTP, independent of any auto-detected plugin (works for PrusaLink, Klipper, or OctoPrint without the Tasmota plugin) - Plugs managed independently of printers (Settings > Smart Plugs) — survive printer deletion instead of being removed with it - Assignable to any printer type, including OctoPrint, for a second plug an auto-detected one doesn't cover - Per-plug label visibility toggle for the dashboard power button - Power toggles now reflect instantly instead of waiting on the next poll cycle - Bumped to Go 1.25
###2026-07-02a - Larger, centered logo on the login/setup pages - Self-service password change from Settings > Your account
###2026-07-02 - Multi-user login — bcrypt-hashed accounts, SQLite-backed sessions, first-run setup page - Login rate-limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes per username - Fixed SSRF via printer URL field (blocks loopback/link-local addresses, including the cloud metadata endpoint) - Added X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff header - Added CI (build/test) on every PR and push to main
###2026-07-01a - Dead code removal, SSE broadcast dedupe
###2026-07-01 - Dedupe digest-auth retry and idle-reload code paths
###2026-06-27e - Fix idle power consumption (watts) not displaying on printer cards - Fix recent files not updating after changing count in settings - Fix potential crash when PrusaLink camera snapshot fails to load - Fix digest auth using wrong URI path for snapshot proxy
###2026-06-27d - New PrusaLink printer plugin — connect Prusa MK4/MK4S, MK3.9, Mini+, XL, and Core One directly via PrusaLink API - HTTP Digest authentication, status monitoring, print control, recent files, and camera snapshots - Automatic print history recording for both OctoPrint and PrusaLink printers - Printer type selector with conditional fields, pause confirmation dialog
###2026-06-27c - Multi-plug Tasmota support with per-plug labeled controls - Smart printing guard: only protects printer plug, auxiliary plugs (lights, fan) can be toggled while printing - Global poll interval setting - YAML config export/import for backup and restore - Pause confirmation dialog
###2026-06-27b - Recent files dropdown with thumbnails, print status, and one-click reprint - Print control: pause, resume, cancel from the dashboard - Recent files count configurable in settings - Security fixes: path traversal guard, XSS fix in reprint handlers
###2026-06-27 - Smart plug power monitoring and control (Tasmota and PSU Control) - Per-printer and bulk power on/off with printing safety guard - Live power consumption display (watts) for Tasmota energy devices
###2026-06-24 - Full code review: 23 issues fixed across bugs, security, performance - API keys stripped from list/SSE responses - Graceful shutdown, settings validation, typed SSE messages - go-sqlite3 bumped for CVE fixes
###2026-06-22 - Initial release - Real-time SSE dashboard with webcam, temps, progress, thumbnails - OctoPrint plugin detection (DisplayLayerProgress, camera-streamer) - Mobile responsive layout with dark mode

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Path to store PrintSpy database and configuration
